promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active replay authority, as current runtime truth, or as permission to promote purgeable cache state files, workspace-layout drift, or detached checksum sidecars into milestone-grade provenance or active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the early a2feed lane closure audit nominated this cache export family as the strongest next source-bearing archive parent after the big-doc lane closed.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates a bounded re-entry seam: a purgeable cache save-export family with five zips, detached checksum sidecars, clean bootstrap versus debug profile split, narrow current-state drift, and stronger retained save bodies than later archive-derived packages.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The early-a2feed closure audit was used to preserve the routing rule that this family outranks deep-archive root descent now, the batch10 child was used to preserve the contrast between richer cache save bodies and thinner later archive-derived save-kit scaffolds, and the deep-archive root split was used to keep the next-lane topology-first descent below this smaller export-lineage bridge.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it remains a topology and registry root over 7805 files and is lower-yield for immediate A2-mid reduction than this bounded cache export family.
Deferred because deep-archive descendant descent should follow the cleaner export-lineage bridge rather than precede it.
Deferred because the relevant packaged-archive comparison now exists as a completed child and should serve as contrast, not as the primary next parent.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summaries already isolate the export-lineage, purgeability, detached-integrity, and retention-gradient seam. A later quote-bound pass can reopen embedded manifests if exact payload listings become necessary.

candidate_items.name: PURGEABLE_CACHE_FAMILY_IS_ARCHIVE_HISTORY_NOT_CURRENT_REPLAY_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest source-class rule in the parent: this family is archive history of recent purgeable save exports, not a current replay or runtime authority surface.

candidate_items.name: EXPORT_LINEAGE_AND_RETENTION_GRADIENT_ARE_THE_LEAST_NOISY_REUSABLE_CORE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's least noisy reusable core: profile splits, detached integrity practice, and narrow state drift provide export-lineage and retention-gradient evidence rather than doctrine.

candidate_items.name: PURGEABLE_CACHE_EXPORTS_RETAIN_FULLER_SAVE_BODIES_THAN_LATER_ARCHIVE_DERIVED_PACKAGES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest cross-family contrast: these purgeable cache exports retain Thread-S full save bodies, sim material, and broader system surfaces that later archive-derived top-layer packages often omit.

candidate_items.name: DETACHED_SHA_SIDECARS_PROVIDE_MINIMAL_INTEGRITY_WITNESS_NOT_RICH_PROVENANCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the real but limited integrity seam: every export has a matching detached sha sidecar, while provenance remains external and thinner than milestone-grade proof.

candidate_items.name: PROFILE_SPLIT_AND_NEARLIVE_STATE_DRIFT_MARK_SAVE_SNAPSHOT_LADDER_NOT_DOCTRINAL_DIFFERENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the bounded read that bootstrap versus debug and timestamped versus smoke differences mainly track save-profile and current-state drift around a mostly stable corpus, not deeper doctrine change.

candidate_items.name: CACHE_EXPORT_BRIDGE_SHOULD_PRECEDE_DEEP_ARCHIVE_ROOT_DESCENT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the current lane-ordering rule that this smaller export-lineage bridge should be reduced before the larger deep-archive root topology and registry descent.

quarantined_items.name: CURRENT_STATE_FILES_INSIDE_CACHE_EXPORTS_AS_ACTIVE_RUNTIME_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly blocks reading embedded current-state files as active runtime truth.

quarantined_items.name: WORKSPACE_LAYOUT_AND_BUILD_SAVE_PROFILE_DRIFT_AS_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The visible drift is packaging and near-live snapshot drift, not doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: CACHE_TIER_PRESENCE_AS_EVIDENCE_OF_MILESTONE_OR_CANON_STATUS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Cache-tier placement is retention policy, not authority or milestone proof.

quarantined_items.name: DETACHED_HASH_MATCH_AS_FULL_PROVENANCE_OR_LEDGER_EQUIVALENT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The sha sidecars are useful but remain much thinner than richer internal provenance or milestone-grade ledger proof.

quarantined_items.name: PURGEABLE_LABEL_AS_PROOF_OF_LOW_INFORMATION_VALUE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The delete marker does not erase the family's witness value as a fuller save-export retention layer.

quarantined_items.name: FOLDER_ORDER_NEXT_STEP_NOTE_AS_LIVE_LEDGER_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent's folder-order note pointing to deep archive does not outrank the live-ledger reentry audit that selected this cache family first.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the cleanest reusable packets in the parent: purgeable-cache demotion, export-lineage and retention-gradient evidence, fuller save-body witness relative to later archive packages, minimal detached-integrity witness, bounded near-live snapshot drift, and the rule that this bridge should precede deep-archive root descent.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, replay, provenance, and milestone authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain runtime overread, doctrinal drift, authority inflation, provenance overread, purgeability-value collapse, or stale folder-order bias rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
